response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive tooling experience (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshops, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this Engineering Productivity Manager role.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and workshop creation
Broad cross-platform expertise including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and build systems
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentorship
Limited documentation of mobile platform ecosystem experience beyond one iOS app
Absence of demonstrated experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
